mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO detect_raw_data (result_id, sample_id, detect_item_id, data_key, data_value, data_type, sort, remark, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.resultId}, #{item.sampleId}, #{item.detectItemId}, #{item.dataKey}, #{item.dataValue}, #{item.dataType}, #{item.sort}, #{item.remark}, #{item.createTime})
